sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἅπας

- Transliteration: Hapas

- Phonetic: hap'-as

- Definition:

1. quite, all, the whole, all together, all

- Origin: from G1 (as a particle of union) and G3956

- TDNT entry: 19:46,8

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G1 (as a particle of union) and G3956; absolutely all or (singular) every one: - all (things) every (one) whole.
